summary: Comprehensive testing of CinemaSync new features (Iteration 2): Invite friends, Live Now dashboard, Notifications. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed for new features: InvitePanel in Lobby, Live Now section in Dashboard, Invitations inbox with Accept/Dismiss, /invite/:roomId route with localStorage redirect stash.
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering is correct: /api/rooms/active is defined before /api/rooms/{room_id} in server.py
Notification password is stored in plain text (by design for recipient to see) - ensure this is acceptable for security requirements
CORS still set to allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True - should use explicit origins in production
seed_data_creation: Used existing alice and bob test users (friends with each other)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: (1) GET /api/rooms/active - returns rooms where user is participant (host or joiner), excludes password_hash, sorted by created_at desc. (2) POST /api/rooms/{id}/invite - creates notification for friend with type='room-invite', stores plain password. (3) GET/POST/DELETE /api/notifications - CRUD for notifications, sorted newest first, excludes _id. (4) Frontend InvitePanel in Lobby with friend picker, password confirm, copy buttons. (5) Dashboard Live Now section shows active rooms with Rejoin button. (6) Dashboard Invitations inbox with Accept (joins room) and Dismiss (deletes notification) buttons. (7) /invite/:roomId?p=password route stashes redirect in localStorage if not logged in, auto-joins after login.

active_rooms.empty_initially: PASS - Returns empty list for new user
active_rooms.shows_created_room: PASS - Shows room where user is host
active_rooms.shows_joined_room: PASS - Shows room where user is joiner (not host)

invite.success: PASS - Creates notification with correct structure (type, room_id, room_name, password, from_user_id, from_name)

notifications.get_empty: PASS - Returns empty list for new user
notifications.shows_invite: PASS - Shows room-invite notification with correct data, no _id
notifications.sorted_newest_first: PASS - Notifications sorted by created_at desc

backend.full_invite_flow: PASS - Host invites -> Friend sees notification -> Friend joins -> Room in active

frontend.dashboard_live_now: PASS - Shows active rooms with Live indicator, participant count, Rejoin button
frontend.dashboard_invitations: PASS - Shows invite count badge, notification cards with Accept/Dismiss buttons
frontend.lobby_invite_panel: PASS - Password input, friend picker, Send Invite button, Copy Link/ID/Password buttons, invite link display
frontend.invite_accept: PASS - Accept button joins room and redirects to /room/:roomId
frontend.invite_route_anon: PASS - /invite/:roomId redirects to login, stashes redirect in localStorage
frontend.invite_route_after_login: PASS - After login, redirects back to invite page and auto-joins room
